name: group_by_companies
description: Group Companies records by one or two fields and compute an aggregate (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, etc.). Use for questions like "how many deals per stage?" or "total revenue by company". Returns groups with dimension values and aggregate results, ordered by the aggregate value.

groupBy.description: Fields to group by (max 2). Each entry must be an object with exactly one field key. Examples: {"status": true}, {"companyId": true}, {"createdAt": {"granularity": "MONTH", "timeZone": "UTC"}}. Available: createdAt (date), updatedAt (date), name, domainName.primaryLinkLabel, domainName.primaryLinkUrl, address.addressStreet1, address.addressStreet2, address.addressCity, address.addressPostcode, address.addressState, address.addressCountry, address.addressLat, address.addressLng, employees, linkedinLink.primaryLinkLabel, linkedinLink.primaryLinkUrl, xLink.primaryLinkLabel, xLink.primaryLinkUrl, annualRecurringRevenue.amountMicros, annualRecurringRevenue.currencyCode, idealCustomerProfile, accountOwnerId.

weekStartDay.description: First day of week (MONDAY, SUNDAY, SATURDAY). Only used when granularity is WEEK.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for date groupings (e.g. "America/New_York"). Default: UTC.

weekStartDay.description: First day of week (MONDAY, SUNDAY, SATURDAY). Only used when granularity is WEEK.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for date groupings (e.g. "America/New_York"). Default: UTC.

aggregateOperation.description: Aggregate operation to apply per group. Default: COUNT. Any operation other than COUNT requires aggregateFieldName.

aggregateFieldName.description: Field to aggregate. Required for any operation other than COUNT. Available fields: id, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt, name, domainName, address, employees, linkedinLink, xLink, annualRecurringRevenue, annualRecurringRevenue.amountMicros, idealCustomerProfile, position, createdBy, updatedBy, searchVector.

limit.description: Maximum number of groups to return (default: 50, max: 100).

orderBy.description: Order groups by aggregate value. DESC (default) gives "top N" behavior.

is.description: Check for missing or empty values. Use "NULL" to find records with no value, "NOT_NULL" for records with a value

like.description: Primary link URL case-sensitive pattern match

ilike.description: Primary link URL case-insensitive pattern match

is.description: Check for missing or empty primary link URL. Use "NULL" to find records with no primary link URL, "NOT_NULL" for records with a primary link URL
Check for missing or empty street 1. Use "NULL" to find records with no street 1, "NOT_NULL" for records with a street 1
Check for missing or empty city. Use "NULL" to find records with no city, "NOT_NULL" for records with a city
Check for missing or empty country. Use "NULL" to find records with no country, "NOT_NULL" for records with a country
Check for missing or empty values. Use "NULL" to find records with no value, "NOT_NULL" for records with a value

or.description: OR condition - matches if ANY of the filters match

and.description: AND condition - matches if ALL filters match

not.description: NOT condition - matches if the filter does NOT match
